name: socratic-comprehension
description: A Socratic sparring partner that helps you truly understand difficult texts and concepts

plugins.name: socratic-comprehension
plugins.description: A Socratic sparring partner that helps you understand difficult texts, papers, and concepts well enough to explain them in your own words. It never summarizes or ghost-writes — it breaks the logic into nodes, makes you restate each one, and names exactly where your wording drifted.
